name: O-2 global --dry-run: /standards-remove --dry-run reports the plan without moving the folder file to _archived/
command: mkdir -p tree/google .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'source:\n  id: legacy\n' > tree/google/legacy.yaml && touch .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-remove.sh" --id legacy --tree "$PWD/tree" --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -f tree/google/legacy.yaml ] && [ ! -d tree/google/_archived ] && echo dry_run 1>&2
